title: Anneslia lambertiana
taxonomy: Anneslia lambertiana is classified as a species within the genus Anneslia, which belongs to the family Diapensiaceae, an order of flowering plants known as Diapeniales. This family is part of the larger class Magnoliopsida, which includes flowering plants with a four- or five-parted flower. Anneslia lambertiana further categorizes to the division Magnoliophyta, or flowering plants, within the kingdom Plantae. The classification is as follows: Diapensiaceae > Anneslia > Anneslia lambertiana. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and genetic makeup.
